news.t: Cango Inc. Joins Bitwise Bitcoin Standard Corporations ETF
The Bitwise Bitcoin Standard Corporations ETF (Ticker: OWNB) Launches on NYSE Arca; Tracks Publicly Traded Companies That Own at Least 1,000 BTC

holdings.infoBox: OWNB is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Strategy stock at 16.39%, MARA Holdings at 10.90%, Hut 8 at 7.39%, Riot Platforms at 6.64%, and CleanSpark at 5.81%.

overview.description: The Bitwise Bitcoin Standard Corporations ETF (OWNB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of companies that hold at least 1,000 bitcoin in their treasury holdings. Securities are also weighted in the portfolio based on the amount of bitcoin held OWNB was launched on Mar 10, 2025 and is issued by Bitwise.

data.title: Cango Inc. Joins Bitwise Bitcoin Standard Corporations ETF
data.text: SHANGHAI , March 18, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) ("Cango" or the "Company"), a leading Bitcoin mining company with an automotive transaction service in China, today announced that it ...
